subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan and Florence Khan, spoken on 1906-06-13
subcodes.first_line: Sagacity is a power which enables one to become cognizant of the existence of a thing by means of the outward senses, or to feel the presence of a thing through certain outward signs.
subcodes.subjects: @the mind's power of discovery, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @limits of the intellect
